pages.title: Kamen Rider Dawn
pages.text: Appears in:$(li)Kamen Rider Zeztz (2025, TV show)$(br2)Transforms with the $(l:zeztz/arsenal/breakam_dawn_taiken)Breakam Dawn (Taiken Mode)$(/l) and $(l:zeztz/devices/dawn_belt)Punishmenter$(/l)$(br2)Status Effects:$(li)Slash IV$(li)Strength IV (with sword)$(li)Strength III (with empty hand)$(li)Resistance II$(li)Jump Boost
